location: Dropped by defeating the NPC invader Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger, who ambushes the player at the Second Church of Marika (tied to Bloody Finger Hunter Yura's questline — if his questline hasn't progressed far enough, a regular enemy spawns in her place instead).

source.name: Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger (Second Church of Marika)

tactics: Travel to Second Church of Marika, north of the Grand Lift of Dectus, via the road north from Altus Highway Junction
Her invasion requires Bloody Finger Hunter Yura's questline to have reached this point — advancing too far past this church can end his questline early and skip the fight
She uses dragon communion incantations (Agheel's Flame, Greyoll's Roar) for wide AoE plus fast bleed-focused poleblade combos — punish incantation recovery windows
Don't over-commit to long combos; she can heal once mid-fight
lore: Eleonora once wielded her twinned poleblade with such speed and grace that witnesses compared her fighting style to a whirlwind. Something has since corrupted her — she now stalks the Second Church of Marika as a blood-hungry invader.

builds.name: Dex/Arcane bleed hybrid
builds.why: Heavy Dex (72) and Arcane (54) scaling over Strength, with 55 innate bleed buildup and Arcane-boosted fire damage
